ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player (e.g., Forward, Midfielder, Defender, Goalkeeper) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's image */,
  "country_of_birth" TEXT /* Country where the player was born */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently playing for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Additional position the player can play */,
  "primary_position" INTEGER /* Whether the position is the player's primary position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year or season the player played in */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player was part of during the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_stats" TEXT /* Player's statistics for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "team_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's image */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the rating is for */,
  "overall_rating" REAL /* Overall rating of the player */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the skills are for */,
  "crossing" REAL /* Crossing skill */,
  "finishing" REAL /* Finishing skill */,
  "heading_accuracy" REAL /* Heading accuracy */,
  "short_passing" REAL /* Short passing skill */,
  "volleys" REAL /* Volleys skill */,
  "dribbling" REAL /* Dribbling skill */,
  "curve" REAL /* Curve skill */,
  "free_kick_accuracy" REAL /* Free kick accuracy */,
  "long_passing" REAL /* Long passing skill */,
  "ball_control" REAL /* Ball control skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the skills are for */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration */,
  "sprint_speed" REAL /* Sprint speed */,
  "agility" REAL /* Agility */,
  "reactions" REAL /* Reactions */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance */,
  "shot_power" REAL /* Shot power */,
  "jumping" REAL /* Jumping */,
  "stamina" REAL /* Stamina */,
  "strength" REAL /* Strength */,
  "long_shots" REAL /* Long shots */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the skills are for */,
  "aggression" REAL /* Aggression */,
  "interceptions" REAL /* Interceptions */,
  "positioning" REAL /* Positioning */,
  "vision" REAL /* Vision */,
  "penalties" REAL /* Penalties */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goalkeeper_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the skills are for */,
  "gk_diving" REAL /* Goalkeeper diving */,
  "gk_handling" REAL /* Goalkeeper handling */,
  "gk_kicking" REAL /* Goalkeeper kicking */,
  "gk_positioning" REAL /* Goalkeeper positioning */,
  "gk_reflexes" REAL /* Goalkeeper reflexes */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goalkeeper_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the contract in millions */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  "contract_extension_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was last extended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the player recovered */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee in millions */,
  "transfer_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transfer */,
  "transfer_clause" TEXT /* Any clauses associated with the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's image */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., viewed player profile, edited player data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the manager is responsible for */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_managers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
